overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game showing a walk through a covered outdoor market bazaar with neon signage, overhead digital billboards, and clothing stalls. The player character walks through the sheltered walkway and stops to interact with a seated vendor NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market entrance with overhead digital billboards

events.description: entering the covered market walkway from the bright exterior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the market entrance toward the interior stalls

entered.detail: large digital screens displaying colorful advertisements above the market entrance
perforated metal roof structure casting geometric shadow patterns on the ground
vertical neon signs with Asian characters on the left wall
metal framework marking the transition into the covered market area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the entrance of a covered cyberpunk market, with large overhead digital billboards visible in the distance. The camera moves forward under a perforated metal canopy that casts dramatic shadows on the concrete walkway, passing neon signage on the left wall as it enters the sheltered market space.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior market passage with clothing merchandise displays

agents.ego_description: walking past clothing stalls with folded garments displayed on tables

entered.detail: wooden tables covered with folded turquoise and gray garments for sale
metal rack with hanging yellow jacket and other clothing items
scattered cardboard boxes and debris on the ground near the stall

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered market, the camera passes by a clothing vendor's stall with tables of folded garments and hanging items on the right. The overhead billboards are now behind as the walkway narrows, with the metal canopy continuing overhead and neon signs illuminating the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: market vendor area with seated NPC attendant

events.description: camera slows and stops in front of the seated vendor NPC

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping to interact with the seated clothing vendor

notable_agents.action: seated woman wearing green top and sunglasses, looking up at the camera

entered.detail: clothing mannequins standing in the background near the stall entrance
hanging white fabric curtain dividing the stall space
flattened cardboard pieces scattered on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a seated vendor NPC and comes to a stop in front of her. The woman sits on a plastic chair wearing a green top and sunglasses, with mannequins and a white curtain visible in the background. The scene focuses on this interaction point within the covered market, with the metal canopy still visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the entrance of a cyberpunk market into a narrow, sheltered corridor that culminates in a personal interaction. It begins by moving forward under a perforated metal canopy that casts dramatic shadows across a concrete walkway, passing neon signage on the left while large digital billboards loom in the distance. As the camera pushes deeper into the market, the perspective shifts past a clothing vendor's stall filled with folded garments and hanging items, leaving the billboards behind as the walkway narrows. The scene then focuses on a seated vendor NPC wearing a green top and sunglasses, coming to a complete stop in front of her. This final point of interaction is framed by mannequins and a white curtain, all while remaining beneath the industrial metal canopy of the bazaar.
